notes: Open weekends (Sat–Sun) only during the public tour season. 2026 season opens June 6; a prior season ran "Saturday, June 7, to Sunday, October 12" suggesting roughly June–October. "The museum is open from 1:00-4:00 pm Saturday and Sunday." Tours are guided and begin at the top of the hour. Group/school tours available mid-March to mid-November by arrangement (email manager@royallhouse.org).
